rationale: Both reviews independently catch the same three real, diff-confirmed problems: the tautological curvature_gauge_transformation, the vacuous oriented : True field, and the redundant banach_steinhaus wrapper, each with sound removal/replacement fixes. Review 1 additionally frames the file as out-of-scope per the roadmap, but acting on it adds nothing beyond the per-declaration fixes both already demand, so the resulting PRs are equally good.
